item.title: A $7,000 Truck Story
item.description: A budget truck purchase is transformed through repairs and upgrades into a functional build. What can you really get for $7,000?

media:content.media:title: A $7,000 Truck Story
media:content.media:description: A budget truck purchase is transformed through repairs and upgrades into a functional build. What can you really get for $7,000?

item.title: Trailer Restoration Project
item.description: An old trailer is repaired and restored to working condition through fabrication and mechanical work. What makes trailer rebuilds worth the effort?

media:content.media:title: Trailer Restoration Project
media:content.media:description: An old trailer is repaired and restored to working condition through fabrication and mechanical work. What makes trailer rebuilds worth the effort?

item.title: Ford Front Tank Hitch Build
item.description: A custom front tank hitch system is fabricated for a Ford, focusing on utility and heavy-duty capability. What’s the purpose of this unique setup?

media:content.media:title: Ford Front Tank Hitch Build
media:content.media:description: A custom front tank hitch system is fabricated for a Ford, focusing on utility and heavy-duty capability. What’s the purpose of this unique setup?

item.title: 3.9 Perkins Engine Revival
item.description: A classic 3.9 Perkins engine is brought back to life through repair and restoration work. What does it take to revive older diesel engines?

media:content.media:title: 3.9 Perkins Engine Revival
media:content.media:description: A classic 3.9 Perkins engine is brought back to life through repair and restoration work. What does it take to revive older diesel engines?

item.title: TDI Jeep
item.description: A Jeep gets a diesel TDI engine swap, combining efficiency and torque in a unique custom build. What changes come with a diesel conversion?

media:content.media:title: TDI Jeep
media:content.media:description: A Jeep gets a diesel TDI engine swap, combining efficiency and torque in a unique custom build. What changes come with a diesel conversion?

item.title: Rear-End Fix Still Going Strong
item.description: A rear-end repair project is put to the test after ongoing work and improvements. How well does the fix hold up under real use?

media:content.media:title: Rear-End Fix Still Going Strong
media:content.media:description: A rear-end repair project is put to the test after ongoing work and improvements. How well does the fix hold up under real use?

item.title: How a Million Kilometers Looks on an Engine
item.description: An engine with over a million kilometers is inspected to see how years of use have affected its internal components. What surprises show up after that much mileage?

media:content.media:title: How a Million Kilometers Looks on an Engine
media:content.media:description: An engine with over a million kilometers is inspected to see how years of use have affected its internal components. What surprises show up after that much mileage?

item.title: ’48 Chevy Fleetmaster Revival
item.description: A 1948 Chevrolet Fleetmaster begins its journey back to running condition through restoration and repair work. Can this classic return to the road once again?

media:content.media:title: ’48 Chevy Fleetmaster Revival
media:content.media:description: A 1948 Chevrolet Fleetmaster begins its journey back to running condition through restoration and repair work. Can this classic return to the road once again?

item.title: Testing a Turbo LS-Swapped Audi
item.description: A turbocharged LS-powered Audi is put to the test to see how the unique setup performs on the road. What happens when German engineering meets American V8 power?

media:content.media:title: Testing a Turbo LS-Swapped Audi
media:content.media:description: A turbocharged LS-powered Audi is put to the test to see how the unique setup performs on the road. What happens when German engineering meets American V8 power?

item.title: 1961 McCulloch Boat Resurfaces After Decades
item.description: A rare 1961 McCulloch boat resurfaces after decades out of sight, bringing vintage marine history back into view. Could this classic be restored?

media:content.media:title: 1961 McCulloch Boat Resurfaces After Decades
media:content.media:description: A rare 1961 McCulloch boat resurfaces after decades out of sight, bringing vintage marine history back into view. Could this classic be restored?

item.description: A massive custom six-door truck project comes together through fabrication, engineering, and creative design work. What makes builds like this so impressive?
